figures.caption: Figure 4: Reconstructions for the piecewise constant example with noisy data. The first row shows the results after 10 iterations for three noise levels; the second row shows the first three iterates for 3% noise.

Figure 2: Reconstructions for the smooth example with noisy data. The first row shows the results after 10 iterations for three noise levels; the second row shows the first three iterates for 3% noise.
